transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder, V-Log, June 28th, 2019, Friday at 1.55pm.

But, yeah, I was working and then I just got tired and I fell asleep.
I don't know what time, maybe 9 or whatever, I don't know.
But I didn't make it all the way through the night.
And, yeah, and I think I got up at like 9.
So if I got to sleep at 9 that night, I only was able to work 12 hours or something.
So yesterday was one of those low, not kind of slow, not as many days up.
I need to not eat as much marijuana candy.
That's what I was thinking when I, last time I got those, I hadn't gotten them for a couple months.

But then I bought these candies and I was eating them.

But anyway, I didn't finish the houses.
I only made it halfway through.
I made it to the end of, almost, not even to the end of, almost the end of 6.

So there's 12 rows.

1.85 kilometers by 1.85 kilometers on the land.

And it's dragging on.

In 3D with all the buildings.
You know, you can do tours of the city on ground level and above.

And then other tours.

Make sure to never, ever buy marijuana candies ever again.

I was jacked.
